mapper.insert: insert into analysis_report (name, create_time, update_time, user_id, source_folder_id, parse_output_id, path) VALUES (#{name}, #{createTime},#{updateTime},#{userId},#{sourceFolderId},#{parseOutputId}, #{path})
mapper.update:
update analysis_results
name = #{name},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
user_id = #{userId},
source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId},
parse_output_id = #{parseOutputId},
path = #{path},
WHERE id = #{id}
